policy: ARCHIVE LIST ONLY — this lane performs NO move/delete/cleanup (archive-first, read-only ownership).

primary_stray_surface.owner: envctl codex-harness maintainer (envctl repo is READ-ONLY to this lane)
primary_stray_surface.root_cause: codex-harness resolves ledger_dir() via harness_root() (crates .../codex-harness/src/lib.rs:112-148): order = env CODEX_HARNESS_ROOT -> compiled_harness_root() -> DEFAULT_HARNESS_ROOT. DEFAULT_HARNESS_ROOT is correctly '/home/flexnetos/meta/src/envctl/home/agent-env' (lib.rs:18) and the old-path Cargo.toml is ABSENT so compiled_harness_root()'s .exists() check fails to lifeos. Live ledger writes still land at the lifeos path with cwd=meta, which is only reachable when the hook launch environment EXPORTS CODEX_HARNESS_ROOT=/home/flexnetos/lifeos/src/envctl/home/agent-env (a stale env var inherited by the codex-harness hook process, not any static file under .codex/.config/rc — grep of configs/hooks/profiles found no static setter, so it is exported at runtime by the codex session launcher/agent-env projection that predates the STRUCTURE relocation). archive.jsonl seq 99-107 record a prior 'pre-fix CODEX_HARNESS_ROOT normalization' attempt, confirming the env-var vector; the residual export remains. The test full_access_contract.rs:239 asserts the harness must NOT contain '/home/flexnetos/lifeos/src/envctl' — now violated at runtime.
primary_stray_surface.fix_owner_action: Unset/repoint CODEX_HARNESS_ROOT to /home/flexnetos/meta/src/envctl/home/agent-env in the codex/claude hook launch environment (session launcher / agent-env projection), rebuild codex-harness from the canonical meta path to purge stale env!(CARGO_MANIFEST_DIR) build artifacts in target/, then archive + remove the stray tree.
primary_stray_surface.recovery: Archive-first per meta-destructive-commands: tar the tree to var/lib/codex-runtime-gate/archives/<UTC>-stray-lifeos-envctl.tar.gz with the checksum_manifest above; restore from that archive if any ledger line is later needed.
primary_stray_surface.cleanup_task: PENDING (owner-executed): (1) repoint CODEX_HARNESS_ROOT; (2) rebuild codex-harness from meta; (3) archive /home/flexnetos/lifeos with checksum; (4) rm -rf /home/flexnetos/lifeos; (5) re-run STRUCTURE-006 name-consumer verification to reconfirm 'absent /home/flexnetos/lifeos'. This lane MUST NOT move/delete (read-only ownership) and cannot quiesce the still-active recreator — see blocker.
